images.alt: Before #5 in Carlsbad: a severely sun-faded and water-damaged random-width distressed American walnut engineered floor, completely worn out with gouging, scratching, scarring, and blackened areas near the kitchen, living room, and stairs, shown prepared for professional dust-free sanding and flattening.
